title: (Bearish Signal) COLL, Stochastic Oscillator left the overbought zone on May 26, 2021
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This is a signal that COLL's price trend could be reversing, and it may be an opportunity to sell the stock or take a defensive position. A.I.dvisor identified 64 similar cases where COLL's stochastic oscillator exited the overbought zone, and 53 of them led to successful outcomes. Odds of Success: 83%. Current price $24.08 crossed the resistance line at $24.10 and is trading between $24.10 resistance and $22.62 support lines. Throughout the month of 04/26/21 - 05/26/21, the price experienced a +0.82% Uptrend. During the week of 05/19/21 - 05/26/21, the stock enjoyed a +0.82% Uptrend growth.

https://preview.redd.it/vv3sdv5wdp171.png?width=1530&format=png&auto=webp&s=f68ca7696927ba42aa788fe4438f1f7313ca54f4

**Bearish Trend Analysis**

The Stochastic Indicator may be shifting from an upward trend to a downward trend. In 53 of 64 cases where COLL's Stochastic Oscillator exited the overbought zone, the price fell further within the following month. The odds of a continued downward trend are 83%.

Following a 3-day decline, the stock is projected to fall further. Considering past instances where COLL declined for three days, the price rose further in 50 of 62 cases within the following month. The odds of a continued downward trend are 82%.

COLL broke above its upper Bollinger Band on May 20, 2021. This could be a sign that the stock is set to drop as the stock moves back below the upper band and toward the middle band. You may want to consider selling the stock or exploring put options.

The Aroon Indicator for COLL entered a downward trend on May 20, 2021. This could indicate a strong downward move is ahead for the stock. Traders may want to consider selling the stock or buying put options.

[Full information about signal](https://tickeron.com/news/11432605-collegium-pharmaceutical-coll-23-44-stochastic-oscillator-left-the-overbought-zone-on-may-26-2021)
